title: Big Globe Compat - Philip's Ruins
description: This datapack adds compatibility between Philip's Ruins and Big Globe.
body: This datapack adds all 190+ structures from Philip's Ruins to the terrain generation for Big Globe. These ruins may be anything from small pillars to sprawling ruins, and they add a nice flair to Big Globe terrain for those that like to explore and want their world to feel like it's been lived in.
